shared-rules.description: Coding standards, architecture, and documentation rules

shared-prompts.description: Reusable prompt fragments for common patterns

build.description: Default build agent for coding tasks

plan.description: Planning agent for architecture and design

plan-arai.description: Plan mode que documenta en plans/

reviewer.description: Code review specialist. Use for PR reviews and quality checks.

tester.description: Testing specialist. Use for writing and running tests.

docs.description: Documentation specialist. Use for README, docs, and changelogs.

test.description: Run test suite for current project
test.template: Run the test suite for this project. First detect the test framework, then run all tests and report results.

deploy.template: Deploy the current project. Check the project type and deployment config, then execute the appropriate deploy command.

commit.template: Stage all changes and create a conventional commit with an appropriate type and scope based on the changes.

plan.description: Generate a detailed requirements plan in plans/ with TDD philosophy
plan.template: Create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS. Follow the TDD process: understand the request, research the codebase, create a plan document in plans/<feature-slug>.md with objective, requirements, architecture decisions, file changes, TDD flow, and verification steps. Write failing tests first, then implement, then verify.

getrepo.description: Clone reference repositories defined in repos.json
getrepo.template: Clone the repository defined in repos.json into references/. Read repos.json, clone the specified repo (or all if 'all' is passed). Run: node .opencode/scripts/repos-sync.js get $ARGUMENTS

updaterepo.description: Update reference repositories already cloned in references/
updaterepo.template: Update the repository already cloned in references/ with latest changes. Read repos.json, pull latest for the specified repo (or all if 'all' is passed). Run: node .opencode/scripts/repos-sync.js update $ARGUMENTS
